text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Narita Brian isn't participating in this
race, Mayano Top Gun uses it as an opportunity
to show her just how much she has grown. Fired
up, she heads to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon brings Narita Brian to the
racecourse so she can watch Mayano Top Gun
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian privately keeps her eyes on Mayano
Top Gun. With her watching, the Takarazuka
Kinen begins.
